This tutorial offers a full list of the AI fluency behaviors cited in the [Anthropic Education Report: The AI Fluency Index](https://www.anthropic.com/research/AI-fluency-index). It's a quick reference to help you understand what each behavior looks like alongside specific tactics you can try in your day-to-day work.

Try it out

## Explore your own AI fluency patterns

Use this prompt to analyze your recent Claude conversations through the lens of AI fluency. You'll get a personalized scorecard. All information should be seen as exploratory, not a formal assessment.

Copy the prompt

Paste it into a new Claude conversation. Works best with Claude's [memory tools](https://support.claude.com/en/articles/11817273-use-claude-s-chat-search-and-memory-to-build-on-previous-context) enabled.
